summary: Comprehensive testing of 7-day Trial Subscription System with Stripe integration. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend trial banner and language selector working correctly. Fixed a bug in Pricing.js where response body was being read twice.

ui_bugs.issue: Response body read twice causing 'body stream already read' error when API returns 401

action_items: Navigation shows 'Precios' in Spanish but 'View Plans' in English - verify this is intentional translation
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user Ivan Rubio
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial subscription system fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/create-trial-subscription, GET /api/trial/status/{session_id}, POST /api/trial/cancel, GET /api/trial/info. Frontend trial banner visible on /pricing with 'Probar 7 Días Gratis' button. Language selector shows 9 languages with flags. Fixed bug in handleStartTrial function.

elements_verified: Yellow/amber trial banner with 'Prueba 7 Días GRATIS' text
Features list (Verificación segura, Acceso completo, Cancela cuando quieras)

trial_success_page.notes: Shows error state when no session_id provided (expected behavior)
elements_verified: Error message 'No se encontró información del trial'
9 languages with flags (ES, EN, FR, DE, IT, PT, ZH, RU, AR)

navigation.notes: Shows 'View Plans' in English, 'Ver Planes' expected in Spanish

trial_endpoints.notes: Returns checkout_url with Stripe session, requires auth
Returns trial status, 404 for invalid session
Cancels active trial, requires auth, 404 if no active trial
Returns user's trial info, requires auth

bug_fixed.issue: Response body was being read twice - once in error check and once for data extraction
bug_fixed.fix: Changed order to read JSON first, then check response.ok status
